settings.name: Athena Top
settings.description: A deep metallic navy bandeau built with premium structural retention — perfect for long afternoons on the deck of a Riva. The Athena Top pairs with its matching bottom or mixes across the edit.
settings.meta: Deep metallic navy · Central ruching structure · Gold-toned hardware

settings.name: Athena Bottom
settings.description: Matching the Athena Top in deep metallic navy, this bottom is built for proportion and movement. Adjustable side-tie geometry creates a flawless, personalized contour.
settings.meta: Deep metallic navy · Adjustable side ties · High waist option

settings.name: Lyra Top
settings.description: A classic twist on minimalist coastal elegance. The Lyra Top blends soft off-white texture with a structured twist-knot bandeau designed for effortless movement from sea to terrace.
settings.meta: Crisp off-white · Twist-knot bandeau · Structural boning

settings.name: Lyra Bottom
settings.description: In the same crisp off-white as the Lyra Top, with adjustable tie geometry at both hips. Engineered for a contoured, European silhouette that moves as beautifully as it looks.
settings.meta: Crisp off-white · Structural side-tie bows · Adjustable fit
